product_overview: A Next.js TypeScript frontend for clinic staff to manage patient intake, reception queues, billing, and archives with role-based access control and validation for clinical data.
core_goals: Provide secure role-based login and redirect users to their appropriate dashboards
Enable receptionists to search, register, and queue patients with required validation
Allow intake nurses to capture validated vital signs and mark intake complete
Allow accountants to view, print, and confirm invoices with archived bill search
Prevent unauthorized role access and display consistent error feedback (Toast or 403 Page)

features.name: User Login
features.description: Authenticate users with credentials, establish role-based session, and redirect to the user's dashboard.
user_flows: Navigate to / -> Fill username/email and password fields -> Submit login form -> Receive role-based session -> Get redirected to /reception or /accountant or /intake or /admin depending on role
Navigate to / -> Fill username/email and password fields -> Submit login form -> See an error when credentials are invalid -> Remain on /login

features.name: Reception Patient Management
features.description: Reception dashboard to search existing patients, open registration modal, and manage the patient queue.
user_flows: Navigate to /reception -> Search patients by name, ID, or QR input -> Select patient from search results -> Use Quick Actions on selected patient -> Observe patient present in receptionist queue
Navigate to /reception -> Open patient registration modal -> Fill mandatory fields (Name, Age) and optional fields -> Submit registration form -> See new patient appear in receptionist queue
Navigate to /reception -> Open patient registration modal -> Leave Name or Age empty -> Submit registration form -> See validation error preventing submission -> Remain in registration modal
Navigate to /reception -> Not authenticated -> See 'Toast' message or 403 Page

features.name: Patient Registration (Validation)
features.description: Ensure patient registration enforces mandatory fields and prevents incomplete records.
user_flows: Navigate to /reception -> Open patient registration modal -> Fill Name field -> Fill Age field -> Fill other optional fields -> Submit registration form -> See success feedback and new patient in queue
Navigate to /reception -> Open patient registration modal -> Leave Name or Age empty -> Attempt to submit registration form -> See field-level validation error and blocked submission

features.name: Intake Vitals Entry
features.description: Intake nurse workflow to select a visit, record validated vitals (BP, temperature, heart rate), and submit with feedback.
user_flows: Navigate to /intake -> Select a patient visit -> Enter blood pressure in 'systolic/diastolic' format (include '/') -> Enter temperature between 35 and 42 -> Enter heart rate -> Submit vitals -> See toast confirmation

Navigate to /intake -> Select a patient visit -> Enter blood pressure without '/' -> Attempt to submit vitals -> See validation error for BP format -> Correct BP to include '/' -> Submit vitals -> See toast confirmation

Navigate to /intake -> Select a patient visit -> Enter temperature below 35 or above 42 -> Attempt to submit vitals -> See validation error for temperature range -> Correct temperature to 35-42 -> Submit vitals -> See toast confirmation
Navigate to /intake -> Not authenticated -> See 'Toast' message or 403 Page

features.name: Post-Intake Access Control (Pharmacy/X-ray gating)
features.description: Ensure downstream services (Pharmacy/X-ray) are only accessible after intake completion.
user_flows: Complete Intake vitals submission on a visit -> Observe 'Intake completed' status on the visit -> Pharmacy/X-ray actions become enabled for that visit
Select a visit without completed Intake -> Attempt to open Pharmacy/X-ray action -> See disabled action or 'Toast' message or 403 Page preventing access

features.name: Accountant Billing and Receipt
features.description: Accountant dashboard to view invoices (auto-refresh), review receipts, print, and confirm payments to discharge visits.
user_flows: Navigate to /accountant -> Observe invoices list auto-refreshing every 10s -> Select an invoice from list -> Review service items and totals in receipt panel -> Click Print to print invoice or receipt -> Click Confirm Payment -> See payment confirmation and visit discharged
Navigate to /accountant -> Authenticated as Receptionist (role forbidden) -> Attempt access -> See 'Toast' message or 403 Page preventing access
Navigate to /accountant -> Select an invoice -> Click Confirm Payment -> API returns error -> See error toast and remain on invoice panel

features.name: Accountant Archive Review
features.description: Search and review archived bills by grouped date sections and open archived invoice details.
user_flows: Navigate to /accountant/archive -> Search archived bills in global search field -> Observe grouped day sections in results -> Expand a grouped day section -> Open archived invoice details modal -> Review invoice data
Navigate to /accountant/archive -> Not authenticated or role forbidden -> Attempt access -> See 'Toast' message or 403 Page

features.name: Error Handling and Access Control
features.description: Consistent handling of unauthorized attempts and validation errors via Toast messages or 403 Page responses.
user_flows: Navigate to /reception or /accountant or /intake -> Not authenticated -> See 'Toast' message -> See 403 Page or be blocked from action -> Optionally redirected to /login
Navigate to /accountant -> Authenticated as Receptionist -> Attempt an accountant-only action -> See 'Toast' message or 403 Page preventing the action

routes.description: Accountant billing dashboard and payment actions
Archived invoices grouped by date with search
Intake nurse vitals and triage workflow

features.name: User Login
features.description: Login using credentials and role-based session
user_interactions: Get redirected to role dashboard on success
See an error when credentials are invalid

features.name: Reception Patient Management
features.description: Search and manage patients from receptionist dashboard
user_interactions: Search patients by name, ID, or QR input
Register new patient and view updates in queue

features.name: Accountant Billing and Receipt
features.description: View invoices, print receipts, and confirm payments
user_interactions: Review service items and totals in receipt panel
Confirm payment and discharge completed visit

features.name: Accountant Archive Review
features.description: Search archived visits and view invoice details
user_interactions: Search archived bills in global search field

features.name: Intake Vitals Entry
features.description: Capture and validate vital signs for triage/intake
user_interactions: Enter blood pressure, temperature, and heart rate
Submit vitals and see toast feedback

known_limitations.issue: TestSprite-generated summary is static and may miss newly added minor routes/features.
known_limitations.impact: Some low-priority scenarios may not be auto-covered in generated plans.
